title: hypericum carinosum
intro: Hypericum carinosum, also known as Shrubby St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and shrub-like appearance. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, and its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Hypericum carinosum is used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and infections, and is also believed to have anti-anxiety and anticonvulsant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal benefits.
